description: Complete CreateDevcontainer main function - Implement the CreateDevcontainer(targetPath string) error function that orchestrates: 1) Check if .devcontainer already exists (skip if yes), 2) For worktrees with primary having .devcontainer, copy entire folder from primary, 3) Otherwise create new: call copyTemplateFiles then generateDevcontainerJSON. Return descriptive errors for each failure case.
acceptance_criteria: CreateDevcontainer returns nil if .devcontainer already exists (idempotent)
For worktrees, copies primary's .devcontainer if it exists
For worktrees without primary .devcontainer or primary branches, creates new folder with all files
Function returns clear error messages for each failure scenario
